div.div:
prompt-babbler-api
ASP.NET Core • .NET 10
Clean Architecture
REST APIs:
/api/babbles (CRUD)
/api/babbles/{id}/prompts (CRUD)
/api/templates (CRUD)
/api/user • /api/user/settings
/api/status (health)
Streaming:
SSE: /api/prompts/generate
WebSocket: /api/transcribe/stream

Azure Cosmos DB
(Serverless, NoSQL)
Database: prompt-babbler
• babbles (pk: /userId)
• generated-prompts (pk: /babbleId)
• prompt-templates (pk: /userId)
• users (pk: /userId)
